violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap was noted not provided at hand washing lavatory in front bar.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food containers noted not properly labeled.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Scoops noted not properly designed with a handle.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. Chlorine = 50 to 100 ppm.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in mens restroom.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceiling in facility noted in need of cleaning and repair.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior grease container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The chemicals for the sanitizing rinse noted not being automatically dispensed. dish-machine has no sanitizer in final rinse. * Needs repair. ( To use three-compartment sink wash- rinse- sanirtize then air dry until dish machine is repaired )
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Some food products noted not covered inside walkin cooler.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided to check con centration of chlorine in dish- machine and three-compartment sink. ( chlorine = 50 to 100 ppm )

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceiling in kitchen area ware-washing and inside walkin cooler noted in need of cleaning. Ceiling fan in mens restroom needs cleaning. Holes in walls need repair.
